## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content performance, updates, and strategies for SEO and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Performance report updated with GA4 data, showing a significant increase in weekly clicks (\~500) driven by design-related pages](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [10 new articles being generated and staged this week; cluster research to be prioritized for future content](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Webstacks is transitioning from Contentful to Sanity CMS as part of their website redesign](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Both teams are open to exploring backlink exchanges and potential automated outreach for link building](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

## Topics

### Performance Report Updates

  - [GA4 data integrated into performance report, focusing on organic search metrics](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [GrowthX content filtered using ChatGPT to separate from Webstacks content](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Significant increase in weekly clicks (nearly 500) observed](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Top-performing pages include bank website design and other design-related content](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Design-focused pages consistently perform well week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Content Generation and AI Tools

  - [10 new articles being generated and staged this week](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Challenges with AI-generated content:](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Inconsistent adherence to brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Forgetfulness in following specific instructions (e.g., describing design elements)](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Need for careful prompt engineering and chunking of tasks](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Teams exploring various AI models:](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Primary use of ChatGPT and Claude](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - [Experimenting with Gemini in Google Docs for quick edits](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [Webstacks setting up Gemini account for custom use](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)

### Content Cluster Research and Prioritization

  - [30 potential topics identified in cluster research](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Plan to prioritize 10-12 topics for immediate focus](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Selection criteria:](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Mix of high search volume topics](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Bottom-of-funnel content for various marketing channels](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Devon to provide additional notes and resources to guide content creation](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

### Website Redesign and CMS Migration

  - [Webstacks transitioning from Contentful to Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Redesign progress:](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [Homepage and solutions pages migrated](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [Client stories migration scheduled for tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
      - [Blog migration planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Sanity CMS expected to be more organized and faster than Contentful](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
  - [Loom video walkthrough to be provided for GrowthX team on content publishing in Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Link Building and SEO Strategies

  - [Both teams interested in backlink exchanges with other accounts](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Webstacks aiming to increase Domain Rating (DR) in 2025](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Potential for automated outbound outreach for link building in the future](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Plan to track backlink information (websites, DR, linked pages) in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to generate Midjourney images for new articles](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Devon to provide a list of prioritized cluster research topics and additional content guidance](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Aida to manually add internal links to articles based on Devon's recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Devon to keep GrowthX updated on website redesign timeline and provide Sanity CMS training materials](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Explore and implement backlink exchange opportunities between Webstacks and GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Consider setting up an Airtable to track backlink information for future link-building efforts](https://fathom.video/share/gB2GT12tHmzzinWtzzZvsVNNfbFMFeuu?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
